data.title: Rudy Giuliani's Legal Crisis Intensifies With Second Contempt Ruling in One Week
data.description: Rudy Giuliani has been held in contempt of court for the second time this week for continuing to spread false claims about Georgia election workers.

data.title: Elon Musk's Ex-Wife And Mother To His 5 Kids Says His Secret To Extreme Success Is Working Harder Than 'Average Bear' And Saying 'No' A Lot
Q4 Market Roller Coaster Reveals Retirement Planning Pitfalls
data.description: The roller coaster markets of the last quarter of 2024 hold some important lessons for how advisors should approach retirement planning with their clients.

data.title: Billionaire Mark Cuban On College Costs: 'Pick The Cheapest School You Can Find – It's About Learning, Not Prestige'
Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Rivian, Intuitive Machines, Rigetti Computing — And Dogecoin Analyst Foresees Drop To 30 Cents
data.description:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The major indices experienced consecutive weekly losses, with the S&P 500 falling 1.9%, the Nasdaq Composite dropping 2.3%, and the Dow sliding nearly 1.9% this week.
